title: Modanthos geranioides
taxonomy: Modanthos geranioides is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the family Acanthaceae. It is native to Mexico and is also known as Mexican firecracker. The plant is classified under the genus Modanthos, and its specific classification is Modanthos geranioides. The classification of the plant is further broken down into its kingdom (Plantae), division (Magnoliophyta), class (Magnoliopsida), order (Lamiales), and family (Acanthaceae). intro: Modanthos geranioides, also known as Modan, is a flowering plant in the family Gentianaceae, traditionally used in herbal medicine. The plant has been reported to possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Modanthos geranioides include iridoid glycosides, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
